Bash(node -e "const d=require\(''./public/data/language/kana.json''\); const romajis = d.map\(k=>k.romaji\).filter\(Boolean\); console.log\(''Total items:'', d.length\); const unique = [...new Set\(romajis\)].sort\(\); console.log\(''Unique romaji:'', unique.length\); console.log\(unique.join\('', ''\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const d=JSON.parse\(require\(''fs''\).readFileSync\(''public/data/language/sentence.json'',''utf8''\)\); console.log\(''Total:'',d.length\); const withFreq=d.filter\(i=>i.frequency_rank!=null && i.frequency_rank<100000\); console.log\(''Valid freq:'',withFreq.length\); withFreq.sort\(\(a,b\)=>a.frequency_rank-b.frequency_rank\).slice\(0,10\).forEach\(\(i,idx\)=>console.log\(idx+1,i.primary_text?.slice\(0,40\),i.frequency_rank\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const d=JSON.parse\(require\(''fs''\).readFileSync\(''public/data/language/sentence.json'',''utf8''\)\); console.log\(''Total:'',d.length\); const withFreq=d.filter\(i=>i.frequency_rank!=null\); console.log\(''With freq:'',withFreq.length\); if\(withFreq.length>0\) { const sorted = withFreq.sort\(\(a,b\)=>a.frequency_rank-b.frequency_rank\).slice\(0,10\); sorted.forEach\(\(i,idx\)=>console.log\(\(idx+1\), i.primary_text.slice\(0,40\), i.frequency_rank\)\); }")

hooks.prompt: A destructive rm -rf command is about to run. Review the target path and determine if this is safe. Block if it targets the repo root, home directory, or system paths. Allow if it targets node_modules, dist, build, or other generated directories.

hooks.command: if echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qE '\.(svelte|ts|js|json|jsonc)"'; then npx @biomejs/biome check --write "$(echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | grep -oP '"file_path":\s*"\K[^"]+')" 2>/dev/null; fi
